title: Blend 001199 and 001198 with 001199 dominance
summary: Use a 70/30 blend that keeps 001199 dominant while adding signal from 001198.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199 behavior. Recreate or safely load the 001198-style prediction stream. Set final predictions to 0.70 * pred_001199 + 0.30 * pred_001198. Do not change feature engineering, folds, or model families beyond what is required for the sibling prediction.
expected_effect: Retain most of the strongest parent while adding a confirmed nearby CatBoost-corrected signal.
risk: If 001198 adds no independent ranking signal, the blend will dilute the better parent.
